Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(* *********************************************************************************** *)
(** * Displayed invertible 2-cells

    This file contains:
    - Proof that being an displayed invertible 2-cell is a proposition
    - The classification of invertible 2-cells in the total category in terms of displayed
    invertible 2-cells. *)
(* *********************************************************************************** *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.



A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁, b₂: B a
x: C a
transportf (λ z : ∑ x : A, B x, C (pr1 z))
  (subtypePath' (idpath (pr1 (a,, b₁)))
     (Bprop (pr1 (a,, b₂)))) x = x


A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁, b₂: B a
x: C a
transportf (λ z : ∑ x : A, B x, C (pr1 z))
  (subtypePath' (idpath (pr1 (a,, b₁)))
     (Bprop (pr1 (a,, b₂)))) x = x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁, b₂: B a
x: C a
transportf (λ z : ∑ x : A, B x, C (pr1 z))
  (paths_rect (B a) b₁
     (λ (b2 : B a) (_ : b₁ = b2), a,, b₁ = a,, b2)
     (idpath (a,, b₁)) b₂ (pr1 (Bprop a b₁ b₂))) x = x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁, b₂: B a
x: C a
p: b₁ = b₂
q: ∏ t : b₁ = b₂, t = p
transportf (λ z : ∑ x : A, B x, C (pr1 z))
  (paths_rect (B a) b₁
     (λ (b2 : B a) (_ : b₁ = b2), a,, b₁ = a,, b2)
     (idpath (a,, b₁)) b₂ (pr1 (p,, q))) x = x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁: B a
x: C a
q: ∏ t : b₁ = b₁, t = idpath b₁
transportf (λ z : ∑ x : A, B x, C (pr1 z))
  (paths_rect (B a) b₁
     (λ (b2 : B a) (_ : b₁ = b2), a,, b₁ = a,, b2)
     (idpath (a,, b₁)) b₁ (pr1 (idpath b₁,, q))) x = x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
Bprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (B a)
C: A → UU
a: A
b₁: B a
x: C a
q: ∏ t : b₁ = b₁, t = idpath b₁
x = x

  reflexivity.
Defined.

(* TODO: should be moved to Bicat.v or bicategory_laws.v *)

C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
Y: f ==> g → UU
α: f ==> g
H₁, H₂: is_invertible_2cell α
y: Y α
transportf (λ z : invertible_2cell f g, Y (pr1 z))
  (cell_from_invertible_2cell_eq (idpath α)) y = y


C: bicat
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
Y: f ==> g → UU
α: f ==> g
H₁, H₂: is_invertible_2cell α
y: Y α
transportf (λ z : invertible_2cell f g, Y (pr1 z))
  (cell_from_invertible_2cell_eq (idpath α)) y = y

  apply transportf_subtypePath'.
Qed.

(** The displayed identity 2-cells are invertible *)

C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff ff


C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff ff

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ff
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
(λ x : ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x)
  ?pr1

  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ff
 exact (disp_id2 ff).
  
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
(λ x : ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x)
  (disp_id2 ff)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
ff ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
(λ y : ff ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff,
 disp_id2 ff •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f)) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• disp_id2 ff =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
     (disp_id2 ff)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
ff ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
ff ==>[ id₂ f] ff

      exact (disp_id2 ff).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
(λ y : ff ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff,
 disp_id2 ff •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f)) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• disp_id2 ff =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
     (disp_id2 ff))
  (disp_id2 ff
   :
   ff ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_id2 ff •• disp_id2 ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (id2_left (id₂ f)) (disp_id2 ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_id2 ff •• disp_id2 ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (id2_left (id₂ f)) (disp_id2 ff)

      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_id2 ff •• disp_id2 ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (id2_left (id₂ f)) (disp_id2 ff)
 exact (disp_id2_left (disp_id2 ff)).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_prebicat C
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
disp_id2 ff •• disp_id2 ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (id2_left (id₂ f)) (disp_id2 ff)
 exact (disp_id2_left (disp_id2 ff)).
Defined.

(** ** Being a displayed invertible 2-cell is a proposition *)
(** The proof of this fact is a bit tricky, and used an intermediate datastructure [disp_iso_total].
*)
Section Prop_disp_invertible_2cell.
  Context {C : bicat}.
  Context {D : disp_bicat C}.

  Definition disp_iso_total
             {a b : C}
             {f g : C⟦a,b⟧}
             {x : invertible_2cell f g}
             {aa : D a} {bb : D b}
             {ff : aa -->[ f ] bb}
             {gg : aa -->[ g ] bb}
             (xx : ff ==>[ x ] gg)
    : UU
    := ∑ (zz : gg ==>[ x^-1 ] ff),
       (@vcomp2 (total_bicat D)
                (a ,, aa) (b ,, bb)
                (f ,, ff) (g ,, gg) (f ,, ff)
                (pr1 x ,, xx) (x^-1 ,, zz)
        =
        @id2 (total_bicat D) (a ,, aa) (b ,, bb) (f ,, ff))
         ×
         (@vcomp2 (total_bicat D)
                  (a ,, aa) (b ,, bb)
                  (g ,, gg) (f ,, ff) (g ,, gg)
                  (x^-1 ,, zz) (pr1 x ,, xx)
          =
          @id2 (total_bicat D) (a ,, aa) (b ,, bb) (g ,, gg)).

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx → disp_iso_total xx

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx → disp_iso_total xx

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
disp_iso_total xx

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ zz : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 (pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, zz) = id₂ (f,, ff)
 × (x ^-1,, zz) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
 exact (pr1 p).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(λ zz : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 (pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, zz) = id₂ (f,, ff)
 × (x ^-1,, zz) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg)) (pr1 p)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(pr1 x • x ^-1),, xx •• pr1 p = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(x ^-1 • pr1 x),, pr1 p •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(pr1 x • x ^-1),, xx •• pr1 p = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 x • x ^-1 = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
xx •• pr1 p =
transportb
  (λ η : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ η] pr2 (f,, ff)) ?p (disp_id2 ff)

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 x • x ^-1 = id₂ f
 apply vcomp_rinv.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
xx •• pr1 p =
transportb
  (λ η : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ η] pr2 (f,, ff)) (vcomp_rinv x)
  (disp_id2 ff)
 apply p.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
(x ^-1 • pr1 x),, pr1 p •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
x ^-1 • pr1 x = id₂ g
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 p •• xx =
transportb
  (λ η : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ η] pr2 (g,, gg)) ?p (disp_id2 gg)

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
x ^-1 • pr1 x = id₂ g
 apply vcomp_linv.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
p: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1 p •• xx =
transportb
  (λ η : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ η] pr2 (g,, gg)) (vcomp_linv x)
  (disp_id2 gg)
 apply p.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
disp_iso_total xx → is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
disp_iso_total xx → is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff
 exact (pr1 z).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
(λ y : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
 xx •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• xx =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)) (pr1 z)

transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C

f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb

transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! vcomp_rinv x) (xx •• pr1 z) = disp_id2 ff

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! vcomp_rinv x) (xx •• pr1 z) =
transportf
  (λ x : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ x] pr2 (f,, ff))
  (base_paths ((pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, pr1 z))
     (id₂ (f,, ff)) (pr12 z))
  (pr2 ((pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, pr1 z)))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
! (! vcomp_rinv x) =
base_paths ((pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, pr1 z))
  (id₂ (f,, ff)) (pr12 z)

        apply C.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
pr1 z •• xx =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

  (! vcomp_linv x) (pr1 z •• xx) = disp_id2 gg

aa: D a

xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (! vcomp_linv x) (pr1 z •• xx) =
transportf
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x] pr2 (g,, gg))
  (base_paths ((x ^-1,, pr1 z) • (pr1 x,, xx))
     (id₂ (g,, gg)) (pr22 z))
  (pr2 ((x ^-1,, pr1 z) • (pr1 x,, xx)))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
! (! vcomp_linv x) =
base_paths ((x ^-1,, pr1 z) • (pr1 x,, xx))
  (id₂ (g,, gg)) (pr22 z)

        apply C.
  Defined.

isweq (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

aa: D a
bb: D b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg

?g (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx x0) = x0

D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx (?g y) = y

 apply disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso_inv.

D: disp_bicat C

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso_inv xx
  (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx z) = z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
   xx •• x0 =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
   × x0 •• xx =
     transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
       (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso_inv xx
     (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx z)) = pr1 z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
   xx •• x0 =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)
   × x0 •• xx =
     transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
       (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg))
 intro; apply isapropdirprod ; apply D.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx
pr1
  (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso_inv xx
     (disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso xx z)) = pr1 z
 reflexivity.

bb: D b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb

D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

bb: D b

inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
p:= fiber_paths H1: transportf
  (λ x : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   (λ η : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
    pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ η] pr2 (f,, ff)) x)
  (base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1)
  (pr2 ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)) =
pr2 (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff)

              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx

     (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) =
transportb (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv x) (disp_id2 ff)

           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
     (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) =
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1 @ ! vcomp_rinv x)
  (xx •• inv2)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
xx
•• transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (base_paths (pr2 x)
        (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
           ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
        (pr1
           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))) inv2 =
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1 @ ! vcomp_rinv x)
  (xx •• inv2)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
xx
•• transportf (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (! base_paths (pr2 x)
          (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
             ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
          (pr1
             (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
                (pr2 x)
                (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                   ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))) inv2 =
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1 @ ! vcomp_rinv x)
  (xx •• inv2)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, pr1 x • h)
     (! base_paths (pr2 x)
          (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
             ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
          (pr1
             (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
                (pr2 x)
                (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                   ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))))
  (xx •• inv2) =
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1 @ ! vcomp_rinv x)
  (xx •• inv2)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, pr1 x • h)
  (! base_paths (pr2 x)
       (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
          ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
       (pr1
          (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
             (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))) =
base_paths ((pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2)
  (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) H1 @ ! vcomp_rinv x

          apply C.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
(x ^-1 • pr1 x),,
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
  (pr21 z) •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr1
  ((x ^-1 • pr1 x),,
   transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (base_paths (pr2 x)
        (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
        (pr1
           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
     (pr21 z) •• xx) = pr1 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr2
  ((x ^-1 • pr1 x),,
   transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (base_paths (pr2 x)
        (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
        (pr1
           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
     (pr21 z) •• xx) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x] pr2 (g,, gg)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr1
  ((x ^-1 • pr1 x),,
   transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (base_paths (pr2 x)
        (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
        (pr1
           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
     (pr21 z) •• xx) = pr1 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
 apply vcomp_linv.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr2
  ((x ^-1 • pr1 x),,
   transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
     (base_paths (pr2 x)
        (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
        (pr1
           (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
              (pr2 x)
              (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
     (pr21 z) •• xx) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x] pr2 (g,, gg)) (vcomp_linv x)
  (pr2 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg))
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
  (pr21 z) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv: (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff)
Hz: (pr1 x,, xx) • inv = id₂ (f,, ff)
× inv • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx (inv,, Hz))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx (inv,, Hz)))))
  (pr21 (inv,, Hz)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
Hz: (pr1 x,, xx) • (inv1,, inv2) = id₂ (f,, ff)
× (inv1,, inv2) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, Hz))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, Hz)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, Hz)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x,, xx) • (inv1,, inv2) = id₂ (f,, ff)
H2: (inv1,, inv2) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
p:= fiber_paths H2: transportf
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   (λ η : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
    pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ η] pr2 (g,, gg)) x)
  (base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2)
  (pr2 ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)) =
pr2 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
p:= fiber_paths H2: transportf (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2) 
  (inv2 •• xx) = disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x) (disp_id2 gg)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)))))
  (pr21 ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2)) •• xx =
transportb (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (vcomp_linv x)
  (transportf (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
     (base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
        (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2) (inv2 •• xx))

D: disp_bicat C

aa: D a
bb: D b

gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
     (pr1

D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C

aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb

inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportf (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (! base_paths (pr2 x)
       (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx

•• xx =
transportf (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2 @ ! vcomp_linv x)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportf (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, h • pr1 x)
     (! base_paths (pr2 x)
          (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
             ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
          (pr1
             (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x)
                (pr2 x)
                (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                   ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))))
  (inv2 •• xx) =
transportf (λ x : g ==> g, gg ==>[ x] gg)
  (base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2 @ ! vcomp_linv x)
  (inv2 •• xx)

          
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
inv1: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
inv2: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ inv1] pr2 (f,, ff)
H1: (pr1 x • inv1),, xx •• inv2 = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
H2: (inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, h • pr1 x)
  (! base_paths (pr2 x)
       (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
          ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))
       (pr1
          (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
             (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
                ((inv1,, inv2),, H1,, H2))))) =
base_paths ((inv1 • pr1 x),, inv2 •• xx)
  (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) H2 @ ! vcomp_linv x

          apply C.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
disp_iso_total xx ≃ is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
disp_iso_total xx ≃ is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
isweq (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx) → disp_iso_total xx
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
∏ x0 : disp_iso_total xx,
?g (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx x0) = x0
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
∏ y : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx),
disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx (?g y) = y

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx) → disp_iso_total xx
 apply disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
∏ x0 : disp_iso_total xx,
disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx x0) = x0
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx z) = z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
   (pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, x0) = id₂ (f,, ff)
   × (x ^-1,, x0) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
pr1
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx
     (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx z)) = pr1 z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : gg ==>[ x ^-1] ff,
   (pr1 x,, xx) • (x ^-1,, x0) = id₂ (f,, ff)
   × (x ^-1,, x0) • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg))
 intro; apply isapropdirprod ; apply (total_bicat D).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
pr1
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx
     (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx z)) = pr1 z
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
        (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx z))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx
              (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx z)))))
  (pr1 z) = pr1 z

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: disp_iso_total xx
isaset (g ==> f)

        apply C.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
∏ y : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx),
disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx y) = y
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z) = z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff),
   (pr1 x,, xx) • x0 = id₂ (f,, ff)
   × x0 • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr1
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
     (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) = pr1 z

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff),
   (pr1 x,, xx) • x0 = id₂ (f,, ff)
   × x0 • (pr1 x,, xx) = id₂ (g,, gg))
 intro; apply isapropdirprod ; apply (total_bicat D).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr1
  (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
     (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) = pr1 z
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr11 (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
        (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) =
pr11 z
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr21 (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
        (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x] pr2 (f,, ff)) ?p (pr21 z)

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr11 (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
        (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) =
pr11 z
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
x ^-1 = pr11 z

          exact (base_paths _ _ (pr1
                                   (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell
                                      (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
                                      (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)))).
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
pr21 (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
        (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) =
transportb
  (λ x : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x] pr2 (f,, ff))
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)))
   :
   pr11 (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell xx
           (disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_inv xx z)) =
   pr11 z) (pr21 z)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
z: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x,, xx)
transportb (λ z : g ==> f, gg ==>[ z] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
  (pr21 z) =
transportb (λ x : g ==> f, gg ==>[ x] ff)
  (base_paths (pr2 x)
     (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z)
     (pr1
        (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x) (pr2 x)
           (pr1_invertible_2cell_total xx z))))
  (pr21 z)

          reflexivity.
  Defined.

  Definition isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell
             {a b : C}
             {f g : C⟦a,b⟧}
             {x : invertible_2cell f g}
             {aa : D a} {bb : D b}
             {ff : aa -->[ f ] bb}
             {gg : aa -->[ g ] bb}
             (xx : ff ==>[ x ] gg)
    : isaprop (is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx)
    := isofhlevelweqb
         1
         ((disp_iso_to_invetible_2cell_weq xx)
            ∘ disp_invertible_2cell_to_disp_iso_weq xx)%weq
         (isaprop_is_invertible_2cell _).

End Prop_disp_invertible_2cell.

(** ** Classification of invertible 2-cells in the total bicategory *)
Section Total_invertible_2cells.
  Context {C : bicat}.
  Context {D : disp_bicat C}.
  Local Definition E := (total_bicat D).

  (** *** If a 2-cell is invertible in the total category, then it is invertible in the base category *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα) → is_invertible_2cell α

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα) → is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hz: is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
inv: (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff)
Hz: (α,, αα) • inv = id₂ (f,, ff)
× inv • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
ii: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ i] pr2 (f,, ff)
Hz: (α,, αα) • (i,, ii) = id₂ (f,, ff)
× (i,, ii) • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
ii: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ i] pr2 (f,, ff)
Hz1: (α,, αα) • (i,, ii) = id₂ (f,, ff)
Hz2: (i,, ii) • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
is_invertible_2cell α

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
g ==> f
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
(λ φ : g ==> f, α • φ = id₂ f × φ • α = id₂ g) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
g ==> f
 exact i.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
(λ φ : g ==> f, α • φ = id₂ f × φ • α = id₂ g) i
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
α • i = id₂ f × i • α = id₂ g

       
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
α • i = id₂ f
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
i • α = id₂ g

       
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
α • i = id₂ f
 exact (base_paths _ _ Hz1).
       
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
i • α = id₂ g
 exact (base_paths _ _ Hz2).
  Defined.

  (** *** If a 2-cell is invertible in the total category, then it is invertible in the fiber *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
∏ Hαα : is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα),
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα Hαα) αα

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
∏ Hαα : is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα),
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα Hαα) αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hz: is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα Hz) αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
inv: (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff)
Hz: (α,, αα) • inv = id₂ (f,, ff)
× inv • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα (inv,, Hz)) αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
ii: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ i] pr2 (f,, ff)
Hz: (α,, αα) • (i,, ii) = id₂ (f,, ff)
× (i,, ii) • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα ((i,, ii),, Hz))
  αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
ii: pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ i] pr2 (f,, ff)
Hz1: (α,, αα) • (i,, ii) = id₂ (f,, ff)
Hz2: (i,, ii) • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
     ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
     ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
gg ==>[
(is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
   ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) ^-1] ff
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
(λ y0 : gg ==>[
        (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
           ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) ^-1] ff,
 αα •• y0 =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv
      (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
         ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2))) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y0 •• αα =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
           ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2))) (disp_id2 gg))
  ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
gg ==>[
(is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
   ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) ^-1] ff
 exact ii.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
(λ y0 : gg ==>[
        (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
           ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2)) ^-1] ff,
 αα •• y0 =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv
      (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
         ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2))) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y0 •• αα =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_total_to_base α αα
           ((i,, ii),, Hz1,, Hz2))) (disp_id2 gg)) ii
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
αα •• ii =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) (disp_id2 ff)
× ii •• αα =
  transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
    (base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
       (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) (disp_id2 gg)

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
αα •• ii =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) (disp_id2 ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
ii •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) (disp_id2 gg)

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
αα •• ii =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) (disp_id2 ff)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
       (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) (αα •• ii) =
disp_id2 ff

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
       (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) (αα •• ii) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ x0] pr2 (f,, ff))
  (base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
     (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1)
  (pr2 ((α • i),, αα •• ii))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
! (! base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii)
       (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff) Hz1) =
base_paths ((α • i),, αα •• ii) (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff)
  Hz1

        apply pathsinv0inv0.
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
ii •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) (disp_id2 gg)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (! base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
       (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) (ii •• αα) =
disp_id2 gg

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (! base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
       (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) (ii •• αα) =
transportf
  (λ x0 : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x0] pr2 (g,, gg))
  (base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
     (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2)
  (pr2 ((i • α),, ii •• αα))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
i: g ==> f
ii: gg ==>[ i] ff
Hz1: (α • i),, αα •• ii = id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff
Hz2: (i • α),, ii •• αα = id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg
! (! base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα)
       (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg) Hz2) =
base_paths ((i • α),, ii •• αα) (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
  Hz2

        apply pathsinv0inv0.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

    refine (is_invertible_total_to_base _ _ Hαα,,
            is_invertible_total_to_fiber _ _ Hαα).
  Defined.

  (** *** If the displayed 2-cell is invertible, then the corresponding 2-cell in the total bicategory is also invertible. *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: (λ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α, is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα) (pr1 H)
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ φ : (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff),
 (α,, αα) • φ = id₂ (f,, ff)
 × φ • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ η : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
 pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ η] pr2 (f,, ff)) ?pr1

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff)
 exact (inv_cell Hα).
      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ η : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
 pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ η] pr2 (f,, ff)) Hα ^-1
 exact (disp_inv_cell αα').
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ φ : (g,, gg) ==> (f,, ff),
 (α,, αα) • φ = id₂ (f,, ff)
 × φ • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg))
  (Hα ^-1,, disp_inv_cell αα')
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(α,, αα) • (Hα ^-1,, disp_inv_cell αα') = id₂ (f,, ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(Hα ^-1,, disp_inv_cell αα') • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(α,, αα) • (Hα ^-1,, disp_inv_cell αα') = id₂ (f,, ff)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(α • Hα ^-1),, αα •• disp_inv_cell αα' =
id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 ((α • Hα ^-1),, αα •• disp_inv_cell αα') =
pr1 (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr2 ((α • Hα ^-1),, αα •• disp_inv_cell αα') =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ x0] pr2 (f,, ff)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 ((α • Hα ^-1),, αα •• disp_inv_cell αα') =
pr1 (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff)
 apply vcomp_rinv.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr2 ((α • Hα ^-1),, αα •• disp_inv_cell αα') =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (f,, ff),
   pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ x0] pr2 (f,, ff)) (vcomp_rinv Hα)
  (pr2 (id₂ f,, disp_id2 ff))
 apply (disp_vcomp_rinv αα').

Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(Hα ^-1,, disp_inv_cell αα') • (α,, αα) = id₂ (g,, gg)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(Hα ^-1 • α),, disp_inv_cell αα' •• αα =
id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg

D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg

is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 ((Hα ^-1 • α),, disp_inv_cell αα' •• αα) =
pr1 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr2 ((Hα ^-1 • α),, disp_inv_cell αα' •• αα) =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x0] pr2 (g,, gg)) ?p
  (pr2 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg))

        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr1 ((Hα ^-1 • α),, disp_inv_cell αα' •• αα) =
pr1 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg)
 apply vcomp_linv.
        
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
H: ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
Hα:= pr1 H: is_invertible_2cell α
Hαα:= pr2 H: is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr1 H) αα
αα':= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
pr2 ((Hα ^-1 • α),, disp_inv_cell αα' •• αα) =
transportb
  (λ x0 : pr1 (g,, gg) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
   pr2 (g,, gg) ==>[ x0] pr2 (g,, gg)) (vcomp_linv Hα)
  (pr2 (id₂ g,, disp_id2 gg))
 apply (disp_vcomp_linv αα').
  Defined.

  (** those maps form a weak equivalence *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
≃ (∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
≃ (∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isaprop
  (∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
