f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isaprop
  (∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isaprop
  (∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isofhlevel 1 (is_invertible_2cell α)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
∏ x0 : is_invertible_2cell α,
isofhlevel 1 (is_disp_invertible_2cell x0 αα)

         
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
isofhlevel 1 (is_invertible_2cell α)
 apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell. 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
∏ x0 : is_invertible_2cell α,
isofhlevel 1 (is_disp_invertible_2cell x0 αα)

         
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
isofhlevel 1 (is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

         
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
α':= α,, Hα : invertible_2cell f g: invertible_2cell f g
isofhlevel 1 (is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

         apply (isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell (x:=α') αα). 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)
→ ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
 apply is_invertible_total_to_disp. 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
(∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell α,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
→ is_invertible_2cell (α,, αα)

    apply is_invertible_disp_to_total.
  Defined.


  (** Now we add some data in front of the [is_(disp)_invertible_2cell], and massage it a bit to get
    an equivalence between [(disp)_invertible_2cell]. *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg)
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg)
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg) ≃ ?Y
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg) ≃ ?Y

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
∏ x0 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg),
is_invertible_2cell x0 ≃ ?Q x0

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
x0: (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg)
is_invertible_2cell x0 ≃ ?Q x0
 apply is_invertible_total_to_disp_weq. 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ x0 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg),
 (λ x1 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg),
  ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x1),
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα (pr2 x1)) x0)
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (x0 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg))
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x0)),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα (pr2 x0)) ≃ ?Y
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (x0 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg))
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x0)),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα (pr2 x0)) ≃ ?Y

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ (x0 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg))
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x0)),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα (pr2 x0))

      apply weqtotal2asstol. 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (x0 : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (g,, gg))
 (p : (λ η : pr1 (f,, ff) ==> pr1 (g,, gg),
       pr2 (f,, ff) ==>[ η] pr2 (g,, gg)) x0),
 (λ x1 : (f,, ff) ==> (g,, gg),
  ∑ Hα : is_invertible_2cell (pr1 x1),
  is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα (pr2 x1)) (x0,, p))
≃ (∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
   (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)

    apply idweq.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα) ≃ ?Y
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)

      apply weqtotal2asstol. 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ (x0 : f ==> g)
   (p : (λ η : f ==> g, is_invertible_2cell η) x0),
   (λ i : invertible_2cell f g,
    disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg) (x0,, p))

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ (x0 : f ==> g) (p : is_invertible_2cell x0)
   (x1 : ff ==>[ x0,, p] gg),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell (x0,, p) x1)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
∏ x0 : f ==> g,
(∑ (αα : ff ==>[ x0] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell x0),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ (p : is_invertible_2cell x0)
   (x1 : ff ==>[ x0,, p] gg),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell (x0,, p) x1)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
(∑ (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg) (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ (p : is_invertible_2cell α)
   (x0 : ff ==>[ α,, p] gg),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell (α,, p) x0)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: f ==> g
(∑ (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg) (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ (p : is_invertible_2cell α) (x0 : ff ==>[ α] gg),
   is_disp_invertible_2cell p x0)

    apply weqtotal2comm.
  Defined.

  (** Finally we combine all of the above into a single theorem *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
 disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)
≃ invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg)

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
 disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)
≃ invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg)
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg) ≃ ?Y
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
?Y
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
invertible_2cell (f,, ff) (g,, gg) ≃ ?Y
 apply step1.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
x, y: C
xx: D x
yy: D y
f, g: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
(∑ (α : f ==> g) (αα : ff ==>[ α] gg)
 (Hα : is_invertible_2cell α),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
≃ (∑ i : invertible_2cell f g,
   disp_invertible_2cell i ff gg)
 apply step2.
  Defined.

End Total_invertible_2cells.

(** Examples of invertible 2-cells *)

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_inv α)
  (disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα))


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_inv α)
  (disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα))

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα) •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_inv α))
  (disp_id2 gg)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
αα •• disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_inv α))
  (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα) •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_inv α))
  (disp_id2 gg)
 exact (disp_vcomp_linv (αα ,, Hαα)).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
αα •• disp_inv_cell (αα,, Hαα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_inv α))
  (disp_id2 ff)
 exact (disp_vcomp_rinv (αα ,, Hαα)).
Defined.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) gg
  ff


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α) gg
  ff

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ x0 : gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
   x0) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff
 exact (disp_inv_cell αα).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
(λ x0 : gg ==>[ inv_of_invertible_2cell α] ff,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
   x0) (disp_inv_cell αα)
 exact (disp_inv_cell_is_disp_invertible_2cell (pr2 αα)).
Defined.

Section VCompDispIsInvertible.

Context {B : bicat}
        {D : disp_bicat B}
        {a b : B}
        {aa : D a} {bb : D b}
        {f g h : a --> b}
        {ff : aa -->[ f ] bb}
        {gg : aa -->[ g ] bb}
        {hh : aa -->[ h ] bb}
        {α : invertible_2cell f g}
        {β : invertible_2cell g h}
        (αα : disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg)
        (ββ : disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh).


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(αα •• ββ) •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 ff)


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(αα •• ββ) •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(αα •• ββ) •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• (ββ •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα))) =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• (ββ •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα))) =
?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
?b =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• (ββ •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα))) =
?b

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
ββ •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) = ?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : g ==> f, gg ==>[ α] ff)
  (vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1)
  ((ββ •• disp_inv_cell ββ) •• disp_inv_cell αα) = 
?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(ββ •• disp_inv_cell ββ) •• disp_inv_cell αα = ?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
ββ •• disp_inv_cell ββ = ?y'

    apply disp_vcomp_rinv.
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> f, gg ==>[ α] ff)
        (vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1)
        (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
           (vcomp_rinv β) (disp_id2 gg)
         •• disp_inv_cell αα)) =
transportb (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• transportf (λ α : g ==> f, gg ==>[ α] ff)
        (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1)
        (transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
           (! vcomp_rinv β) (disp_id2 gg)
         •• disp_inv_cell αα)) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
        (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1))
     (transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
        (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
           (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
              (! vcomp_rinv β)))
        (αα •• (disp_id2 gg •• disp_inv_cell αα)))) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα •• (disp_id2 gg •• disp_inv_cell αα)) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> f, gg ==>[ α] ff)
        (id2_left α ^-1) (disp_inv_cell αα)) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα
   •• transportf (λ α : g ==> f, gg ==>[ α] ff)
        (! id2_left α ^-1) (disp_inv_cell αα)) =

D: disp_bicat B

hh: aa -->[ h] bb

ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)

D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα •• disp_inv_cell αα) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
?b =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (αα •• disp_inv_cell αα) = ?b

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
αα •• disp_inv_cell αα = ?t2

    exact (disp_vcomp_rinv αα).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : f ==> f, ff ==>[ x] ff)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1))
  (transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (! vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (! vcomp_rinv α @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! id2_left α ^-1) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
        (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
   maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
     (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
   ! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1)) (disp_id2 ff) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> f, ff ==>[ z] ff)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 ff)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
! vcomp_rinv α @
maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h) (! id2_left α ^-1) @
maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
  (maponpaths (λ h : g ==> g, h • α ^-1)
     (! vcomp_rinv β)) @
maponpaths (λ h : g ==> f, α • h)
  (! vassocr β β ^-1 α ^-1) @
! vassocl α β (β ^-1 • α ^-1) =
! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof B a b f g h α
    (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)

  apply B.
Qed.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
transportb (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 hh)

D: disp_bicat B

hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
transportb (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 hh)

D: disp_bicat B

aa: D a

hh: aa -->[ h] bb

ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
transportb (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
?b

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ
   •• (disp_inv_cell αα •• (αα •• ββ))) = ?b

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
disp_inv_cell αα •• (αα •• ββ) = ?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocr α ^-1 α β) ((disp_inv_cell αα •• αα) •• ββ) =
?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell αα •• αα) •• ββ = ?t2

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
disp_inv_cell αα •• αα = ?y'

    apply disp_vcomp_linv.
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
        (vassocr α ^-1 α β)
        (transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
           (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ)) =
transportb (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
     (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ
   •• transportf (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
        (! vassocr α ^-1 α β)
        (transportf (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
           (! vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg) •• ββ)) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
        (! vassocr α ^-1 α β))
     (transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
        (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
           (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
              (! vcomp_linv α)))
        (disp_inv_cell ββ •• (disp_id2 gg •• ββ)))) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ •• (disp_id2 gg •• ββ)) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ
   •• transportb (λ α : g ==> h, gg ==>[ α] hh)
        (id2_left β) ββ) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

hh: aa -->[ h] bb

αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @

transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @

D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ •• ββ) = ?b
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
?b =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ •• ββ) = ?b

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
disp_inv_cell ββ •• ββ = ?t2

    exact (disp_vcomp_linv ββ).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
     (vcomp_linv β) (disp_id2 hh)) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ x : h ==> h, hh ==>[ x] hh)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β))
  (transportf (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
     (! vcomp_linv β) (disp_id2 hh)) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
transportf (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (! vcomp_linv β @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! id2_left β) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
        (! vcomp_linv α)) @
   maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
     (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
   ! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β)) (disp_id2 hh) =
transportf (λ z : h ==> h, hh ==>[ z] hh)
  (! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
       (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)) (disp_id2 hh)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
! vcomp_linv β @
maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0) (! id2_left β) @
maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
  (maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> g, h0 • β)
     (! vcomp_linv α)) @
maponpaths (λ h0 : g ==> h, β ^-1 • h0)
  (! vassocr α ^-1 α β) @
! vassocl β ^-1 α ^-1 (α • β) =
! is_invertible_2cell_vcomp_subproof0 B a b f g h α
    (pr2 α) β (pr2 β)

  apply B.
Qed.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) (αα •• ββ)


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) (αα •• ββ)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
hh ==>[ (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) ^-1] ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(λ y : hh ==>[ (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) ^-1] ff,
 (αα •• ββ) •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
   (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• (αα •• ββ) =
   transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
     (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
     (disp_id2 hh)) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
hh ==>[ (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) ^-1] ff
 exact (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(λ y : hh ==>[ (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) ^-1] ff,
 (αα •• ββ) •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
   (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• (αα •• ββ) =
   transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
     (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
     (disp_id2 hh))
  (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα)
 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(αα •• ββ) •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 ff)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 hh)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(αα •• ββ) •• (disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 ff)
 exact vcomp_disp_is_invertible_rinv.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(disp_inv_cell ββ •• disp_inv_cell αα) •• (αα •• ββ) =
transportb (λ α : h ==> h, hh ==>[ α] hh)
  (vcomp_linv (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β))
  (disp_id2 hh)
 exact vcomp_disp_is_invertible_linv.
Defined.

End VCompDispIsInvertible.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
disp_invertible_2cell (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β)
  ff hh

ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh

(λ x : ff ==>[ comp_of_invertible_2cell α β] hh,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) x) ?pr1

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
a, b: B
aa: D a
bb: D b
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
hh: aa -->[ h] bb
α: invertible_2cell f g
β: invertible_2cell g h
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
ββ: disp_invertible_2cell β gg hh
(λ x : ff ==>[ comp_of_invertible_2cell α β] hh,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (comp_of_invertible_2cell α β) x) (αα •• ββ)

  apply vcomp_disp_is_invertible.
Defined.


B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f) (disp_lunitor ff)

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
ff ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f) ^-1] id_disp xx ;; ff
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
(λ y0 : ff ==>[
        (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f) ^-1] id_disp
                                               xx ;; ff,
 disp_lunitor ff •• y0 =
 transportb
   (λ α : id₁ x · f ==> id₁ x · f,
    id_disp xx ;; ff ==>[ α] id_disp xx ;; ff)
   (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f))
   (disp_id2 (id_disp xx ;; ff))
 × y0 •• disp_lunitor ff =
   transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
     (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f))
     (disp_id2 ff)) ?pr1

xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
ff ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f) ^-1] id_disp xx ;; ff
 exact (disp_linvunitor ff).

   (disp_id2 (id_disp xx ;; ff))

     (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f))
     (disp_id2 ff)) (disp_linvunitor ff)

      apply B.
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor
           {B : bicat}
           {x y : B}
           {f : x --> y}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[f] yy)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (lunitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_lunitor f) (id_disp xx;; ff) ff
  := disp_lunitor ff,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_lunitor ff.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_runitor
           {B : bicat}
           {x y : B}
           {f : x --> y}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[f] yy)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (runitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_runitor f) (ff;; id_disp yy) ff
  := disp_runitor ff,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_runitor ff.

  (disp_rinvunitor ff)

      ff ;; id_disp yy ==>[ α] ff ;; id_disp yy)
     (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))
     (disp_id2 (ff ;; id_disp yy))) (disp_runitor ff)
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_rinvunitor ff •• disp_runitor ff =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))
  (disp_id2 ff)
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_runitor ff •• disp_rinvunitor ff =
transportb
  (λ α : f · id₁ y ==> f · id₁ y,
   ff ;; id_disp yy ==>[ α] ff ;; id_disp yy)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; id_disp yy))

  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))

yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_rinvunitor ff •• disp_runitor ff = ?b

xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
?b =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))
  (disp_id2 ff)

D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_rinvunitor ff •• disp_runitor ff = ?b
 apply disp_rinvunitor_runitor. 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x

  (rinvunitor_runitor f) (disp_id2 ff) =

  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f))
  (disp_id2 ff)

      apply B.

D: disp_bicat B

  (λ α : f · id₁ y ==> f · id₁ y,

B: bicat
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
! runitor_rinvunitor f =
! vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f)

      apply B.
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor
           {B : bicat}
           {x y : B}
           {f : x --> y}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[f] yy)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (rinvunitor f,, is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor f) ff (ff;; id_disp yy)
  := disp_rinvunitor ff,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor ff.


B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg hh)


B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h)
  (disp_lassociator ff gg hh)

  
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ^-1] ff ;; 
(gg ;; hh)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
(λ y0 : ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ^-1] ff ;; 
        (gg ;; hh),
 disp_lassociator ff gg hh •• y0 =
 transportb
   (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
    ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
   (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h))
   (disp_id2 (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))
 × y0 •• disp_lassociator ff gg hh =
   transportb
     (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
      ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h))
     (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh))) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) ^-1] ff ;; 
(gg ;; hh)
 exact (disp_rassociator ff gg hh).

w, x, y, z: B

 × y0 •• disp_lassociator ff gg hh =

     (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh)))
  (disp_rassociator ff gg hh)

B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B

h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

      apply B.
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_lassociator
           {B : bicat}
           {w x y z : B}
           {f : w --> x}
           {g : x --> y}
           {h : y --> z}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {ww : D w}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           {zz : D z}
           (ff : ww -->[f] xx)
           (gg : xx -->[g] yy)
           (hh : yy -->[h] zz)
  : disp_invertible_2cell
      (lassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_lassociator f g h) _ _
  := disp_lassociator ff gg hh,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_lassociator ff gg hh.


B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h)
  (disp_rassociator ff gg hh)

hh: yy -->[ h] zz
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h)
  (disp_rassociator ff gg hh)

   (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))
   (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh))
 × y0 •• disp_rassociator ff gg hh =
   transportb
     (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
      ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))
     (disp_id2 (ff ;; (gg ;; hh))))
  (disp_lassociator ff gg hh)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
disp_rassociator ff gg hh •• disp_lassociator ff gg hh =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh))

transportb
  (λ α : f · (g · h) ==> f · (g · h),
   ff ;; (gg ;; hh) ==>[ α] ff ;; (gg ;; hh))
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; (gg ;; hh)))

?b

?b =

  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))

B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B

gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz

?b
 apply disp_rassociator_lassociator. 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
h: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
D: disp_bicat B
ww: D w
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: ww -->[ f] xx
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (rassociator_lassociator f g h)
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g · h ==> f · g · h,
   ff ;; gg ;; hh ==>[ α] ff ;; gg ;; hh)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg ;; hh))

gg: xx -->[ g] yy
hh: yy -->[ h] zz
! rassociator_lassociator f g h =
! vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h)

      apply B.

B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B

      apply B.
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator
           {B : bicat}
           {w x y z : B}
           {f : w --> x}
           {g : x --> y}
           {h : y --> z}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {ww : D w}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           {zz : D z}
           (ff : ww -->[f] xx)
           (gg : xx -->[g] yy)
           (hh : yy -->[h] zz)
  : disp_invertible_2cell
      (rassociator f g h,,
                   is_invertible_2cell_rassociator f g h) _ _
  := disp_rassociator ff gg hh,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_rassociator ff gg hh.


B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ g₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz
gg₂: yy -->[ g₂] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α gg₁ gg₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) (ff ◃◃ αα)

gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz
gg₂: yy -->[ g₂] zz

is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) (ff ◃◃ αα)

gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz

ff ;; gg₂ ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff ;; gg₁

x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

α: invertible_2cell g₁ g₂

gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz
gg₂: yy -->[ g₂] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α gg₁ gg₂
(λ y0 : ff ;; gg₂ ==>[
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff ;; gg₁,
 (ff ◃◃ αα) •• y0 =
 transportb
   (λ α : f · g₁ ==> f · g₁,
    ff ;; gg₁ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₁)
   (vcomp_rinv
      (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)))
   (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₁))
 × y0 •• (ff ◃◃ αα) =
   transportb
     (λ α : f · g₂ ==> f · g₂,
      ff ;; gg₂ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₂)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)))
     (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₂))) ?pr1

xx: D x

zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz
gg₂: yy -->[ g₂] zz

ff ;; gg₂ ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff ;; gg₁
 exact (ff ◃◃ disp_inv_cell αα).

    ff ;; gg₁ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₁)

 × y0 •• (ff ◃◃ αα) =

      ff ;; gg₂ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₂)
     (vcomp_linv

     (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₂))) (ff ◃◃ disp_inv_cell αα)

  (λ α : f · g₁ ==> f · g₁,
   ff ;; gg₁ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₁)

  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₁))

  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)))

B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ g₂
D: disp_bicat B

yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz

αα: disp_invertible_2cell α gg₁ gg₂
(ff ◃◃ αα) •• (ff ◃◃ disp_inv_cell αα) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g₁ ==> f · g₁,
   ff ;; gg₁ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₁)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₁))
 abstract
        (refine (disp_lwhisker_vcomp _ _ @ _) ;
         refine (maponpaths _ (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_rinv _)) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite disp_rwhisker_transport_right ;
         rewrite disp_lwhisker_id2 ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply (transportf_paths (λ p, _ ==>[ p ] _)) ;
         apply B).
    
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell g₁ g₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg₁: yy -->[ g₁] zz
gg₂: yy -->[ g₂] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α gg₁ gg₂
(ff ◃◃ disp_inv_cell αα) •• (ff ◃◃ αα) =
transportb
  (λ α : f · g₂ ==> f · g₂,
   ff ;; gg₂ ==>[ α] ff ;; gg₂)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff ;; gg₂))
 abstract
        (refine (disp_lwhisker_vcomp _ _ @ _) ;
         refine (maponpaths _ (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_linv _)) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite disp_rwhisker_transport_right ;
         rewrite disp_lwhisker_id2 ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply (transportf_paths (λ p, _ ==>[ p ] _)) ;
         apply B).
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
           {B : bicat}
           {x y z : B}
           {f : x --> y}
           {g₁ g₂ : y --> z}
           {α : invertible_2cell g₁ g₂}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           {zz : D z}
           (ff : xx -->[f] yy)
           {gg₁ : yy -->[g₁] zz}
           {gg₂ : yy -->[g₂] zz}
           (αα : disp_invertible_2cell α gg₁ gg₂)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (_ ,, is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker f (pr2 α)) _ _
  := disp_lwhisker ff αα,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_lwhisker ff αα.


B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) (αα ▹▹ gg)

zz: D z

ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) (αα ▹▹ gg)

zz: D z

ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
ff₂ ;; gg ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff₁ ;; gg
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(λ y0 : ff₂ ;; gg ==>[
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff₁ ;; gg,
 (αα ▹▹ gg) •• y0 =
 transportb
   (λ α : f₁ · g ==> f₁ · g,
    ff₁ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₁ ;; gg)
   (vcomp_rinv
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
   (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg))
 × y0 •• (αα ▹▹ gg) =
   transportb
     (λ α : f₂ · g ==> f₂ · g,
      ff₂ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
     (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; gg))) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
ff₂ ;; gg ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff₁ ;; gg
 exact (disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg).
  
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(λ y0 : ff₂ ;; gg ==>[
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) ^-1] ff₁ ;; gg,
 (αα ▹▹ gg) •• y0 =
 transportb
   (λ α : f₁ · g ==> f₁ · g,
    ff₁ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₁ ;; gg)
   (vcomp_rinv
      (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
   (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg))
 × y0 •• (αα ▹▹ gg) =
   transportb
     (λ α : f₂ · g ==> f₂ · g,
      ff₂ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg)
     (vcomp_linv
        (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
     (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; gg))) (disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg)
 
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(αα ▹▹ gg) •• (disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f₁ · g ==> f₁ · g,
   ff₁ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₁ ;; gg)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg))
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg) •• (αα ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f₂ · g ==> f₂ · g,
   ff₂ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; gg))

    
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(αα ▹▹ gg) •• (disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f₁ · g ==> f₁ · g,
   ff₁ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₁ ;; gg)
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff₁ ;; gg))
 abstract
        (refine (disp_rwhisker_vcomp _ _ @ _) ;
         refine (maponpaths _ (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_rinv _)) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite disp_rwhisker_transport_left_new ;
         rewrite disp_id2_rwhisker ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply (transportf_paths (λ p, _ ==>[ p ] _)) ;
         apply B).
    
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f₁ f₂
D: disp_bicat B
xx: D x
yy: D y
zz: D z
ff₁: xx -->[ f₁] yy
ff₂: xx -->[ f₂] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂
(disp_inv_cell αα ▹▹ gg) •• (αα ▹▹ gg) =
transportb
  (λ α : f₂ · g ==> f₂ · g,
   ff₂ ;; gg ==>[ α] ff₂ ;; gg)
  (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)))
  (disp_id2 (ff₂ ;; gg))
abstract
        (refine (disp_rwhisker_vcomp _ _ @ _) ;
         refine (maponpaths _ (maponpaths _ (disp_vcomp_linv _)) @ _) ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite disp_rwhisker_transport_left_new ;
         rewrite disp_id2_rwhisker ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite !transport_f_f ;
         apply (transportf_paths (λ p, _ ==>[ p ] _)) ;
         apply B).
Defined.

Definition disp_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
           {B : bicat}
           {x y z : B}
           {f₁ f₂ : x --> y}
           {g : y --> z}
           {α : invertible_2cell f₁ f₂}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           {zz : D z}
           {ff₁ : xx -->[f₁] yy}
           {ff₂ : xx -->[f₂] yy}
           (gg : yy -->[g] zz)
           (αα : disp_invertible_2cell α ff₁ ff₂)
  : disp_invertible_2cell (_ ,, is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker g (pr2 α)) _ _
  := disp_rwhisker gg αα,, is_disp_invertible_2cell_rwhisker gg αα.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
p: α = β
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ
  (transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg) p αα)


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α, β: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
Hβ: is_invertible_2cell β
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
p: α = β
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ
  (transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg) p αα)

D: disp_bicat B

xx: D x
yy: D y

gg: xx -->[ g] yy

is_disp_invertible_2cell Hβ αα

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧

xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy

Hα = Hβ

  apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
Defined.

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_z_iso_disp (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα) αα
αα •• ?pr1 =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 ff)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_z_iso_disp (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα) αα
(λ _ : αα •• ?pr1 =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
         (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 ff),
 ?pr1 •• αα =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
   (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr10

D: disp_bicat B

gg ==>[ Hα ^-1] ff
 exact (inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hαα).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_z_iso_disp (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα) αα
αα •• inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hαα =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 ff)
 abstract (cbn;
    etrans;
    [apply (inv_mor_after_z_iso_disp Hαα)|];
    unfold transportb;
    apply maponpaths_2 ;
      apply cellset_property).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_z_iso_disp (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα) αα
(λ _ : αα •• inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hαα =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
         (vcomp_rinv Hα) (disp_id2 ff),
 inv_mor_disp_from_z_iso Hαα •• αα =
 transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
   (vcomp_linv Hα) (disp_id2 gg))
  (disp_hom_disp_z_iso_to_invertible_2cell_subproof B
     D x y f g α Hα xx yy ff gg αα Hαα)
 abstract (cbn;
    etrans;
    [ apply (z_iso_disp_after_inv_mor Hαα) |];
    unfold transportb;
    apply maponpaths_2;
       apply cellset_property).
Defined.

Isos.inv_from_z_iso (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)] ff
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
d:= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
?pr1 ;; αα =
transportb (mor_disp gg gg)
  (pr2
     (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
        (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
  (id_disp gg)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
d:= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ _ : ?pr1 ;; αα =
       transportb (mor_disp gg gg)
         (pr2
            (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
               (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
         (id_disp gg),
 αα ;; ?pr1 =
 transportb (mor_disp ff ff)
   (pr1
      (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
         (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
   (id_disp ff)) ?pr10

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
d:= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
gg -->[
Isos.inv_from_z_iso (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)] ff
 exact (disp_inv_cell d).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
d:= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
disp_inv_cell d ;; αα =
transportb (mor_disp gg gg)
  (pr2
     (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
        (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
  (id_disp gg)
 abstract (cbn; unfold transportb;
              etrans;
              [ exact (disp_vcomp_linv d) |];
              unfold transportb;
              apply maponpaths_2;
              apply cellset_property).
  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα
d:= αα,, Hαα : disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg: disp_invertible_2cell (α,, Hα) ff gg
(λ _ : disp_inv_cell d ;; αα =
       transportb (mor_disp gg gg)
         (pr2
            (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
               (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
         (id_disp gg),
 αα ;; disp_inv_cell d =
 transportb (mor_disp ff ff)
   (pr1
      (Isos.z_iso_is_inverse_in_precat
         (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα)))
   (id_disp ff))
  (disp_hom_disp_invertible_2cell_to_z_iso_subproof B
     D x y f g α Hα xx yy ff gg αα Hαα)
 abstract (cbn; unfold transportb;
              etrans;
              [ exact (disp_vcomp_rinv d) |];
              unfold transportb;
              apply maponpaths_2;
              apply cellset_property).
Defined.

gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
is_z_iso_disp (α,, is_inv2cell_to_is_z_iso α Hα) αα
≃ is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: disp_hom xx yy f
gg: disp_hom xx yy g
αα: ff -->[ α] gg
isaprop (is_disp_invertible_2cell Hα αα)
 apply (@isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell _ D _ _ _ _ (α ,, Hα)).
Qed.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α, β: invertible_2cell f g
p: α = β
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : invertible_2cell f g,
      disp_invertible_2cell z ff gg) p αα) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg)
  (maponpaths pr1 p) αα


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α, β: invertible_2cell f g
p: α = β
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : invertible_2cell f g,
      disp_invertible_2cell z ff gg) p αα) =
transportf (λ z : f ==> g, ff ==>[ z] gg)
  (maponpaths pr1 p) αα

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: xx -->[ g] yy
α: invertible_2cell f g
αα: disp_invertible_2cell α ff gg
pr1 αα = αα

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** Transporting along displayed invertible 2-cells *)
Definition transport_1cell
           {B : bicat}
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {x y : B}
           {f g : x --> y}
           (p : f = g)
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
  : xx -->[ g ] yy
  := transportf (λ z, _ -->[ z ] _) p ff.


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p))
  (transport_1cell p ff) ff


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f g p))
  (transport_1cell p ff) ff

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell
  (inv_of_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
  (transport_1cell (idpath f) ff) ff

  exact (disp_id2_invertible_2cell ff).
Defined.

Definition transport_along_inv_2cell
           {B : bicat}
           (HB : is_univalent_2_1 B)
           {D : disp_bicat B}
           {x y : B}
           {f g : x --> y}
           (α : invertible_2cell f g)
           {xx : D x}
           {yy : D y}
           (ff : xx -->[ f ] yy)
  : xx -->[ g ] yy
  := transport_1cell (isotoid_2_1 HB α) ff.


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
  (transport_along_inv_2cell HB α ff) ff


B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
disp_invertible_2cell (inv_of_invertible_2cell α)
  (transport_along_inv_2cell HB α ff) ff

  
B: bicat
HB: is_univalent_2_1 B
D: disp_bicat B
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
inv_of_invertible_2cell
  (idtoiso_2_1 f g (isotoid_2_1 HB α)) =
inv_of_invertible_2cell α

  abstract
    (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
     cbn ;
     rewrite idtoiso_2_1_isotoid_2_1 ;
     apply idpath).
Defined.
